title: Persistent Leak
review: We've had a persistent leak that 2 other companies claimed they�d fixed. John and his lads came out and after starting, they found it wasn't what we'd always been told, fixed it and lowered the price. I mentioned a couple of broken tiles, luckily he had matching in the van and didn't even charge us. Would definitely recommend!

title: Highly Professional builders
review: Excellent team of craftsmanship. No exaggeration for any job requested. Electronic receipts and guarantee cards are always followed in 24-48hrs. This is the 2nd time we have used their services.

title: Extention roof done by builders which had many faults/leaks need the whole roof redone
review: Outstanding work, had no further problems since the work was carried out. I'm very happy and have recommend this company to to many friends

title: Roof repair
review: Poor experience with this company. Provided a guarantee for roof repairs but when the roof started leaking again they weren't interested, despite this happening well within the guarantee period.

title: Repair chimney flashing & soakers
review:
Highly recommended. My initial call was returned within an hour. John came to view what was needed within another hour & I had an emailed quote by end of that day.

                Pricing was very fair and the Genesis crew arrived exactly on the agreed day/time.

                It was great to have photos of the work done  and know for sure the repair was good.

                Many thanks again to Mark, John & crew :)

title: Ongoing problems with Condensation caused from roof.
review:
Had an ongoing problem, that others have not been able to solve. Genesis with their knowledge and experience were able to explain that my roof needed vent and to prove air flow.
                Genesis carried out the works to a high standard, and throughout the whole process there was continuous communication.
                Since completion the issue has now been solved.
                I�m very happy, & would highly recommend.
                Thank you Genesis.

title: Slate roof re-tiled and replaced guttering/fascias
review:
Would definitely recommend Genesis and use them again. They provided a great service from start to finish.

                John provided an honest and competitive quote that didn't catastrophise our problem in order to get more money out of us. John explained clearly what they were going to do, showing us photos of the work needed on the roof, and they were generous in doing extra bits with little extra charge.

                They arrived on time every day and had their own scaffolding tower which brought the cost right down. They even helped out by taking with them some waste materials we had from a separate job.

title: Leaking roof
review: A few weeks ago now I had a severely leaking roof. I managed to get in contact with Genesis. And at the drop of a hat they came around and done an excellent job, repairing it, which ended up saving me thousands in damage that could�ve been done to the rest of the property, if not, repaired quickly excellent job great reliability would highly recommend to anyone out there ????????

title: Flat roof on a summerhouse
review: Very professional from start to finish quick clean and tidy asked for a few extra things to be carried out while they were there great job ??

title: New roof
review:
Work carried out as planned and on schedule no extra cost added as I have had experience in the past would highly recommend John and his team for any project excellent work ??

                Would use there service again in the future.

title: Roofing job re do the rig tiles and replace the flat roof

I can�t thank this team enough, they turned up when we agreed, got straight to work stripping a leaky flat roof, replaced the flat roof will a pitched roof, the work is outstanding and I�m getting many compliments daily,

title: Roof Replacement
review: My roof needed much work doing, ridge tiles need repointing. Chimney stack repointing.Gutters all round replaced.Brick work needed pointing.And my flat roof was replaced with felt. All work was done to a very high standard. On time with all work completed. Property left spotless.Excellent team, very professional and polite.

title: Flat roof replace
review: Very professional service clean tidy and honest will 100% recommend

title: Replacing of tiles.
review:
John was very good at his job and on time, which is very hard to find these days. Also very tidy when leaving after the job.

                Extremely polite and I would recommend to anybody.

                Have recommended to a few friends and I wouldn�t hesitate to have him back again if we needed more work carried out.

title: Roofing
review: Amazing work, good price and very quick to help

title: New roof
review: John a the team are very reliable very professional at there job. I would highly recommend genesis roofing top quality workmanship. If yu need any work done highly recommend

title: Roofing
review: Very happy with the work carried out an amazing fella and an amazing team done a lovely job quick and a reasonable price would recommend to anyone who wants the right job doing many thanks, Sam

title: New Felt Roof
review: Extremely professional from beginning to end. Got the job done at very short notice to a high standard and at a reasonable price. Would certainly recommend, particularly as we have had questionable experiences with others in the area.

title: New rear extension roof
review:
John and his team were an absolute delight. Im always nervous about having work done but john made me feel at ease from the moment he came to look. He gave what i felt was a very good price and the work carried out was top quality. John and his team were quick and efficient always making sure the outside of my house was clean and cleared of all mess. John provided me with pictures and kept me informed all the way through the job. I would definitely recommend him and he will be the first person I call for any work that needs doing in the future.
                Thanks to John and team.

title: Great work
review: Great work on my roof and cleaned the front drive for me .

title: New roof fitted
review: John and the team arrived on time and worked really hard on our roof.  They were friendly and courteous and kept us informed throughout.  We are really pleased with them and our new roof.

title: Fixing roof leak
review: John attended a survey and diagnosed what the issue was relatively quickly, offering advice without me prompting on anything.  Once the timeslot was agreed, the team arrived early for the job, were courteous (I work at home and we have a young baby so tried to minimize noise), but kept us informed throughout of what they were doing, whilst keeping the areas tidy.  Overall the team were great and could not ask for anymore from them, thank you.

title: Refitting a slipped roof tile
review:
What can I say!? My partner posted on the app 'Next Door' that we had a slipped roof tile and asked for any local tradesperson recommendations.  Mark replied, offering to come and fix the issue - for free!
                Three friendly members of his team came over and fixed the hanging tile, as well as another issue that I didn't realise I had.  They wouldn't accept any cash for the job nor even a cup of tea!
                I am blown away at the kind gesture and I hope that leaving this review will somehow pass the goodwill forward!
                Thank you!!

title: Flat roof over two garages
review: Great job.  Clean.  Efficient and polite.

title: Fix guttering, replace seal and waterproof wall.
review: Genesis provides an excellent service, we have always used them and will recommend them to family and friends.  I�ve always received a very quick response to my messages, they have attended to look at the job within hours or otherwise communicated excellently as to when they are available to attend, completing the job on arrival or scheduling a suitable time frame.  Arriving when expected and carrying out an extremely honest, reliable, professional service.  We found Genesis very honest and helpful, we really appreciated advice given to us about how to improve our facias ourselves to!  Very happy.

title: External wall
review: Great experience from start to finish.  Great communication and the guys did a really good job and were so helpful.  Did an extra job as well with our front door which was a nightmare to open and close so really appreciate their time to fix it.  Thoroughly recommend these builders.  Will def have them back for more work

title: Roof regeneration
review: On time.  Polite.   Efficient.  Left neat and tidy.

title: Replacing lead flashing on roof
review: A little late turning up but got down to work straight away.  Job was completed as far as I can tell to a good standard.  Workers were very courteous and helpful in advising on another job.

title: Side return roof replacement
review:
Contacted Genesis via Checkatrade and received a swift response and from there things flowed like clockwork.
                Quote time arranged - Quote back next day - Works scheduled - Works done. How things should be.
                Great standard of work, again, just how it should be

title: Rendering front of house
review: Great job!  Great bunch of guys!  Rendered front and side of my house and couldn�t be happier from start to finish.  10/10 service thanks guys

title: A small repair to a waste pipe up side of house.
review: These guys were very quick at responding to initial inquiry and turned up for both the quote and the work when agreed, would recommend.

title: Pointing and waterproofing chimney
review: The Genesis team did a good tidy job on our chimney.  They were helpful and polite and I would use their services again.

title: Replacing missing/broken roof tiles
review: The roofers came the next day, at the time agreed and were professional.  I had a quote for a small job to replace a missing roof tile or two at the back of the house at a reasonable price.  They replaced several tiles and repointed the ridge quickly and to a high standard.  Very happy with all aspects.

title: Flat roof and main roof repairs
review: Efficient and reassuring service.  The company provide photos of before and after and a guarantee.  We will be recommending to others in the local area.

title: Roof works
review: Genesis team was excellent they did everything I asked and more.  I would recommend them.   Good, clean and tidy work.  Nothing too much trouble.

title: Fixing roof leaks and gutter cleaning
review: We had leaks on two flat-roofed dormers and needed the gutters cleaning.  Mark's team have done an excellent job, providing photos of the work taken from the cherry picker.  Competitively priced and very easy to deal with.  Thoroughly recommend for any roofing or guttering work and will use them again.

title: Lean Too Roof
review: WOW!  Soooo happy with the work Mark's team did for us.  Professional, polite and friendly.  We are now leak free and actually looking forward to the winter!  Thank you Mark, and your team, we will definitely be back with other work needing to be done.

title: Leak to pitched roof
review: Friendly and professional from quoting to completion of the works required.  Would highly recommend the team.

title: Roof repairs, all ridge tiles repointed, all damaged tiles replaced and front gutters cleaned.
review: Mark and his staffs had done a great job!  I'm very impressive with their prompt service, especially they stopped leaking before the work start which is really thoughtful!I will highly recommend Genesis, they are very effective, professional and honest !

title: Brickwall
review: Very good service,work is done to a high standard,polite and always on time,highly recommend.

title: Rendering and painting
review: I couldn't be happier with the work that was carried out and completed to a very high standard.  Very punctual and well mannered.  I highly recommend.

title: New facias, roof, gutters
review: Excellent company highly recommended

title: Lean to roof replacement
review: Amazing job, cleaned up when they had finished.  Men kept me informed of progress the whole time.  Fantastic job, thank you

title: Exterior painting
review: Excellent service

title: Cleaning roof, sealing and repointing ridge tiles
review: I cannot fault the Genesis team (John, Reece, Ben, Joe and Joe Snr).  Their work on the roof of my 1934 old bungalow has totally transformed it.  They jet-washed, sealed and repointed ridge tiles.  It now looks like a new roof.  They also came across some other minor repairs which they fixed AND they removed my garden rubbish, cleaned the windows, solved an outside dripping tap problem, none of which quoted for but done free of charge.  On completion, everything was left clean and tidy.  I couldn't' be more pleased that I chose Genesis Roofing and Building.  10 out of 10 isn't enough!

title: To chop of old rendering put on a damp proof sealer re render and paint
review: They arrived on time and did a really good job they keeped me informed with what was going on throughout the job they were clean and tidy throughout the job I am very pleased with the hole job

title: Replace flat roof on garden building
review: Quote was done quickly and seemed very good value for money.  The work was done soon after we accepted the quote, the 3 men turned up promptly and worked hard to finish within 2 days as promised.  The new grey felt roof looks really smart.  As a retired architect I could tell that the men knew what they were doing and it�s a proper job.  They made the effort to source the black soffits I wanted, and left everything clean and tidy.  Highly recommended.

title: Replacement of roof
review: From Reece coming for the initial visit to asses the work needed, through to the completion of the work, Genesis were a pleasure to deal with.  Not having owned a property before, I felt quite out of my depth but the guys at Genesis were so organised that everything was very straight-forward.  The team worked so amazingly hard to get it completed and in freezing temperatures.  I wouldn't hesitate to recommend them to others.

title: Felt and Batton tile replacement
review: Got the job done , looks perfect and are very nice people and they make sure the job gets done without a doubt .

title: Flat roof
review: Very fast and efficient, great guys would definitely use again, would definitely use again, and would recommend to a friend.

title: To remove the illegal Cowling on my Chimney and fit one that meets the regulations
review: THEY CAME THEY SAW THEY CONQUERED.  I had a couple of high quotes for my small job as I was told access to the top of the high chimney was very difficult, on Wednesday I contacted Genesis and spoke to Mark who said they were in my area and someone would view the job within the hour.  Within the hour the job was assessed and quoted for and booked in for a time of my convenience for today Friday.  The price quoted by Genesis was a third of the cheapest of the other two.  The communication from Mark was excellent and overall the company was a pleasure to deal with and I would strongly recommend them.

review: Very reasonable Quote for complete downstairs decorating, including fitting/hanging of new doors.  Friendly service, very tidy, efficient work and to a high standard.  Recommended.

title: Fixed leaking flat roof
review: Great service!  Speedy, polite, and efficient.

title: New roof
review: We instructed Genesis to install a new roof for us during our extension/renovation works.  You need someone you can trust.  We were highly impressed at their work and their honest approach was also refreshing.  We have since recommended them to friends and family and they are coming back to do further work eg fencing, patio.  I have also asked them to carry out work on my parents roof and they did a good job on that also.  Mark has provided valuable tips and commented on work we had carried out previously.  Mark, Jonathan and the team are a pleasure to work with and respond promptly to enquiries.

title: New roof fitted
review: Very happy with my experience with the company.  Work was carried out to a high standard they made me feel very understanding.  Before they carried out the work they explained every step they was going to complete.  My garden was also left immaculate after work completion.  Job well done!!

title: Amazing response
review: I have filled the quote request on check a trade and got response under 2mins.  The fastest response I ever received iny life.   They arranged for someone to visit the same day which is even great for a quote, so far the best experience ever.

title: Flat roof
review: Polite efficient friendly and professional service even took away some rubbish not created by the job

title: Replacing damaged asbestos garage roof
review: I want to give a big shout of thanks to Genesis (Reece, Jonothan, Matt and Ben) who removed the asbestos roof from my garage, which had been damaged during Storm Eunice.  They were very quick (and,in fact, the only company to respond!) Within 15-20 minutes of the posting going out on Checkatrade l received a phone call from the owner, Mark, who organised a team to arrive the next morning and assess what was needed.  A quote was received and as soon as l received approval from my insurance company arrangements were made for the work to take place.  An excellent job and l highly recommend them!??

title: Replacing a tiles on roof
review: Reece was very professional and polite, tiles came off my roof during the storm, I was unsure of where on roof as I couldn�t see.  Reece for straight up there and found the problem took pictures and showed me.  He replaced the tiles for me then and there.  Very happy with the work that was carried out and the way it was carried out, I will recommend Reece to family and friends from now on and to anyone in need of a roofer.

title: Replacing missing tiles and fixing facias
review: Excellent work, great effort by the workers and didn't take long either

title: New roof
review: Over the moon with the work carried out by everyone at genesis.  Very friendly and professional and highly recommended

title: Re roof
review: Excellent work carried out and all the lads very polite and knowledgeable would definitely use again

title: Roof repair and 4 different chimneys, adding a roof vent and connecting to an extractor
review: The team are courteous and considerate.  I guess the work (cant check when its a roof) is working, as its been dry/not leaked the last 2 times its rained so far.  Fingers Crossed!

title: Replace Fascia, Soffit and Guttering
review: Mark and his team were fantastic.  Came round to provide a quote the same day we phoned.  Carried out the job exactly as they said they would in the timescale agreed.  Would highly recommend Genesis Roofing and Building to anyone looking for a company who are professional, effective, hard working very nice to deal with and excellent value for money.  I can't speak highly enough of them.  Wonderful company!

title: Outhouse roof
review: Constantly updated as work done at other property.  Put in extra insulation and rather than use existing tiles, used new ones as these would last longer.  Quotation did not allow for these but there was no extra charge.  Tidied up and left premises clean and tidy.  Would use again.

title: Replace gutters
review: Jonathan and two others arrived on time to replace poorly fitted and leaking gutters.  The work was carried out neatly and quickly and I would be happy to use them again.

title: Replacing and re-setting damaged slates round chimney.  Repaired Boundary Wall with waterproofer
review: Very impressed with the service and the work.  Having had a leak after the torrential rain, we were a bit desperate.  Jonathan came on time, assessed the job and took photos.  Mark sent us a quote that evening.  We accepted the job.  Originally they said they could come on 13th October and when they realised we were very worried in case there was more rain, they said they would come on Sunday 10th.  We were very grateful.  Again they arrived on time and stayed for over 6 hours to finish the work.  Ben and Brian were professional and friendly.  We have already recommended them to our neighbours.

title: Painting and decorating
review: High standard of work very quick efficient and polite

title: New guttering to all of property.
review: Thank you genesis roofing!   After having two other companies round that didn�t even look in my gutters and wanted to charge me the earth to replace them, I was recommended by a friend to call genesis roofing and building.  They came the next day to quote, very professional.  Very happy with the work a real pleasure to to business with.  I will be using again in the near future to replace my flat roof.

title: Repair on leaking guttering and cleaned thoroughly
review: Excellent service, fixed my leaking guttering problem great work done by Jonathan!!  I would definitely use them again, thank you!

title: Re pointing of all ridge tiles and moss removal

Very reliable and responsive

title: Shed roof
review: The work that was carried out to a very good standard and friendly staff

title: Flat roof replacement
review: Prompt response to my initial query from Mark.  Competitive quote followed after inspection of the old roof by Jonathan.  Turned up at promised time, completed the job quietly and efficiently and did some other minor repairs that they noticed free of charge.  Always polite and professional.  Will definitely use again.

title: New flat roof fitted
review: From the start, the company impressed, from the initial visit to review what was needed, to the subsequent quote (a photo taken of the roof accompanying it), the work itself (2 weeks later) and the invoicing.  The guys wore face masks without being asked and kept me - and my neighbour - informed throughout proceedings.  Given the heat of the day and the constraints of the site (transporting and removal of materials had to be through the house) they were remarkably professional and good humoured.  The roof looks good and I have no reason to doubt the quality of their work.  Thank you!

review: Brilliant work very pleased

review: Very pleased with the quality of the work that was done, and the way it was done - polite, efficient and tidy.  A pleasure to do business with these guys.  We will have them back for any further work we might need and can thoroughly recommend them to others.

review: First rate service from Genesis roofing!   Prompt, reliable and professional from quotation to completion of work.   Would highly recommend to anyone.   Thanks again!
